behavior_summary: Provides the Avatar item/system gameplay hooks: a simple 'U8P_AVATAR::use' handler that toggles the item's UI (gump) and several utility/behavior processes that implement developer/debug menus, initialization, movement reactions, scheduled environment effects, and randomized guardian barks.

U8P_AVATAR::use: When the player 'uses' the avatar item the script reads Item::getStatus(this) and either closes the existing gump (Item::closeGump(this)) or opens the avatar gump (Item::openGump(0x01h, this)).

U8P_AVATAR::look: A large developer/cheat conversation loop presenting menus and numeric slider inputs; it supports flows to spawn/create items (by type/frame/quality/quantity), run demo/test sequences that set many story flags, create EndGame fragments, play SFX, and invoke targeting for placement. Many sub-branches call external creation, targeting, randomization and SFX helpers.

U8P_AVATAR::func331F: A smaller dialogue/menu helper used by the U8P_AVATAR::look flow. Presents a menu and sets many story/progression flags in a particular branch (the 'ginaf' path) and otherwise shows a short line 'Bzzzzt! Thank you for playing!'.

U8P_AVATAR::cachein: Initialization-like process run at cache/load-in that disables air-walk, may put the avatar in stasis during setup, spawns/awaits background watcher processes, calls METHOD::func15E7, and sets a local 'getUp' guard so initialization runs once. If cheats are enabled it releases stasis.

U8P_AVATAR::justMoved: Movement-triggered utility that reads the avatar position and performs proximity-based checks to find/keep a nearby candidate item, destroying or replacing candidates as appropriate; toggles/clears avatarEndure/avatarArmor flags to avoid repeat processing.
U8P_AVATAR::schedule: Timed/scheduling process that checks the map id and toggles stormsActive, spawning FadeToPalette processes for rain/fire transitions then suspending while the fade runs.

U8P_AVATAR::guardianBark(word): Chooses a short guardian bark line. Special sentinel values for the parameter trigger a randomized selector (rndRange) then map the numeric choice to concrete bark text; used to produce flavor lines from a guardian actor.
notable_control_flow: U8P_AVATAR::look runs as a conversation loop: builds option arrays (local23/local22), Ask suspends capture menu choices (local20/local11/local9/local12) and strcmp-based branching dispatches into nested flows (Create, Demo, EndGame fragments, Done).

Targeting and creation U8P_AVATAR::use suspend/Ask patterns: the U8P_AVATAR::look flow spawns a targeting process (process target()) and captures the resulting target into a suspend-assigned local (local12) before reading Item::getX/Y/Z of that target to create items near it.

U8P_AVATAR::cachein performs staged init: check getUp flag, possibly set stasis, spawn helper processes (FREE::func1C19) and suspend until they complete, call METHOD::func15E7 multiple times, and finally set getUp=1. AvatarCanCheat() gated release from stasis.
U8P_AVATAR::schedule gates behavior by map id (Npc::getMap) and flips stormsActive, spawning FadeToPalette variants and suspending to wait for them.
U8P_AVATAR::guardianBark interprets special parameter sentinels by replacing them with rndRange-selected values, then maps integer choices to Bark outputs.
open_questions: Which menu entries in U8P_AVATAR::look are intended for end-users vs. developer/cheat-only (MakeAvatarACheater suggests developer gating but exact gating conditions are unclear).
Exact semantics and ranges of sentinel values in U8P_AVATAR::guardianBark (metadata shows several sentinel patterns and rndRange ranges but the mapping to text indices is partially inferred).

Precise effects and intended U8P_AVATAR::use of many story flags set in U8P_AVATAR::func331F and the 'ginaf' branch (e.g., all the metNecN flags and teleporter flags) — their downstream game consequences are outside this script.

The full behavior of some external helpers (e.g., METHOD::func15E7, FREE::func1C19, MakeAvatarACheater, FREE::createItemsAtLocation) is referenced but not defined here — how they affect world state is inferred but not certain.

main_function.name: U8P_AVATAR::use
main_function.purpose: Toggle the avatar item's UI gump: if the item's status word indicates the gump is open (status & 0x0100) then close it; otherwise open the avatar gump (gump id 0x01).
entry_conditions: Invoked on the item's 'U8P_AVATAR::use' event (player activates/uses the Avatar item).
Reads word Item::getStatus(this) and tests bit 0x0100 to choose close vs open.

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::use
function_map.role: Item 'U8P_AVATAR::use' handler — open/close avatar gump UI

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::look
function_map.role: Developer/cheat interactive conversation loop with menus, creation flows, demo branches and targeting

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::func331F
function_map.role: Dialogue/menu helper invoked by U8P_AVATAR::look; sets many story flags in one branch and shows a short dialogue line for other choices

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::cachein
function_map.role: Initialization process run on cache/load-in (stasis control, spawn/await watchers, call METHOD::func15E7)

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::justMoved
function_map.role: Movement-triggered utility: proximity detection and candidate selection/destroy for nearby items; clears relevant avatar flags

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::schedule
function_map.role: Timed behavior scheduler: toggles stormsActive and spawns FadeToPalette processes based on map and storm flags

function_map.name: U8P_AVATAR::guardianBark
function_map.role: Select and emit guardian bark lines based on a selector parameter (with sentinel-driven randomization)

internal_calls.purpose: Dispatch a smaller menu/dialog helper for certain sub-flows; U8P_AVATAR::func331F sets story flags or shows a short dialogue line.
No direct canonical call observed; listed here only if U8P_AVATAR::schedule is triggered by other engine events. (Included for completeness; direct call not confirmed.)

external_calls.purpose: Read item status word to decide whether the gump is open (test 0x0100).
Open the avatar UI/gump (called with gump id 0x01 and this item).
Close the avatar UI/gump when status indicates it is open.
Collect numeric parameters (type, frame, quality, quantity) from the player in the create/spawn flows.
Present yes/no prompts to accept default quality/quantity choices in create flows.
Start a targeting process so the player selects a target location/object for item placement; result captured via suspend into local12.
Spawn/create multiple items at a chosen location using collected parameters (quantity/type/frame/quality).
Safely create EndGame fragment items at or near coordinates (performs legality checks), used in fragment creation sub-flows.
Generate random offsets used to scatter created items around target points.
Call out to a general initialization/setup helper as part of the cache-in sequence.
Spawn background watcher helper processes (spawn codes observed) and suspend until they complete during initialization.
Disable air-walk for this avatar actor during initialization.
Place the avatar in stasis during init and release stasis if cheats enabled (AvatarCanCheat check).
Compute distance to candidate items for proximity selection and replacement logic.
Destroy outdated or out-of-range candidate items during proximity checks.
Push the selected nearby item reference at end of the routine (likely to return or register it for further U8P_AVATAR::use).
Read current map id to decide whether to run the storm toggling logic.
Spawn palette fade/visual transition processes for storm on/off states and suspend while they run.
Replace sentinel parameter values with a random choice from a sentinel-specific range to randomize bark selection.
Play sound effects as feedback during demo/cheat flows.

reads.name: afterDaemonScene
reads.likely_effect: Checked to determine whether the after-daemon demo/sequence has already run; prevents re-running the demo branch in U8P_AVATAR::look.

reads.name: local6
reads.likely_effect: Used as a control/boolean to decide whether creation should be placed at a targeted location (inferred from create flow).

reads.name: getUp
reads.likely_effect: Checked at the start of U8P_AVATAR::cachein to skip initialization if already run.

reads.name: avatarEndure
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_AVATAR::justMoved to decide whether proximity/selection handling runs.

reads.name: avatarArmor
reads.likely_effect: Alternate mode read by U8P_AVATAR::justMoved to run a similar proximity/selection handling.

reads.name: rainStormActive
reads.likely_effect: Checked by U8P_AVATAR::schedule to choose the rain FadeToPalette variant when toggling storms.

reads.name: fireStormActive
reads.likely_effect: Checked by U8P_AVATAR::schedule to choose the fire FadeToPalette variant when toggling storms.

writes.name: afterDaemonScene
writes.likely_effect: Set to mark that the after-daemon demo has run (prevents repeated demo initialization).

writes.name: MalchirTest
writes.likely_effect: Set in a demo/test branch to trigger or record the Malchir death/test scenario.

writes.name: malchirMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to mark that Malchir has been met (story/progression state altered by demo branch).

writes.name: getUp
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 at the end of U8P_AVATAR::cachein to mark initialization as complete.

writes.name: avatarEndure
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) by U8P_AVATAR::justMoved after handling to avoid repeated triggers.

writes.name: avatarArmor
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) by U8P_AVATAR::justMoved in appropriate branches to avoid re-triggering.

writes.name: stormsActive
writes.likely_effect: Toggled by U8P_AVATAR::schedule to indicate whether storm visuals are currently active (flip on/off).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the Avatar item/system gameplay hooks: a simple 'U8P_AVATAR::use' handler that toggles the item's UI (gump) and several utility/behavior processes that implement developer/debug menus, initialization, movement reactions, scheduled environment effects, and randomized guardian barks.
